name: dev-digest-harness
description: Internal Claude Code plugins for shared engineering workflows.

plugins.name: sdd-engineering
plugins.description: Spec-driven development end to end: request to agreed spec, verified plan, implementation, and review gate — with human approval at the two moments that matter.

plugins.name: research-tools
plugins.description: Read-only research subagent for codebase and web lookups, returning a short answer with file:line or URL citations instead of prose.

plugins.name: architecture-review
plugins.description: Read-only architectural review: layering, dependency direction, coupling, module boundaries, and where business logic belongs.

plugins.name: engineering-paved-path
plugins.description: The single source for shared technical skills — TypeScript, React, Next.js, Fastify, Drizzle, PostgreSQL, Zod, Testing Library, Mermaid.
